name: small-molecule-design-tools
description: BioSymphony small-molecule design skills for public-safe tool routing and evaluation.

interface.longDescription: Public-safe small-molecule design skills for choosing and applying open synthesis-planning, docking, affinity, QSAR, ADMET, pocket-finding, and ligand-generation tools.
defaultPrompt: Use $small-molecule-design-tools to choose open small-molecule design tools.
